ddls:
CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm */,
  "firm_description" TEXT /* Description of the firm */,
  "firm_website" TEXT /* Website of the firm */,
  "firm_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the firm */,
  "firm_email" TEXT /* Email address of the firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm the analyst belongs to */,
  "analyst_description" TEXT /* Description of the analyst */,
  "analyst_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "analyst_email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "analyst_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., BAC, UBS) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who wrote the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the report (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst recommendation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the recommendation belongs to */,
  "to_grade" TEXT /* To grade (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "from_grade" TEXT /* From grade (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action (e.g., main, up, down) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price of the stock */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_recommendations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES research_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_news_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES news_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst performance */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric (e.g., accuracy, return) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_performance_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation history */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "to_grade" TEXT /* To grade (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "from_grade" TEXT /* From grade (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action (e.g., main, up, down) */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_history_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES analyst_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm_analysts" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst in the firm (e.g., lead analyst, associate analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id", "analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_sectors" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise in the sector (e.g., market research, financial analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analysts" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst started covering the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_stock" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock mentioned in the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id", "stock_id")
)
